title: Research Administration as Customer Service — D-RED Seminar Slides (Lee/Steiner)
display_label: Research Admin as Customer Service Slides (2024-05-08)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-05-08 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Research Administration as Customer Service', co-presented by Matthew Lee (MBA, PMP) and Becca Steiner. Reframes research admin work through a customer-service lens to improve PI/department relationships.
